---
title: |
  <div style="position: relative;">
    Influence Functions and Machine Unlearning <br>
    <img src="logo_png_set/IROKO-text.png" height="70">
    <img src="logo_png_set/Logo_IMAG.png" height="70">
    <img src="logo_png_set/LOGO_CNRS.png" height="70">
    <img src="logo_png_set/inr_logo.png" height="70">
    <img src="logo_png_set/logo_um.png" height="70">
  
  </div>
author: "Alex Alì Maleknia"
date: "03/12/2026"
format: 
  revealjs:
    css: custom.css
    transition: slide
    #slide-number: true
    date-format: "DD MMM YYYY"
editor:
  render-on-save: true
#bibliography: refs.bib
#bibliographystyle: apa
---

## Formation
```{=html}
<div style="display:flex;gap:1rem;align-items:flex-start;flex-wrap:nowrap;">
  <iframe src="https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=!1m18!1m12!1m3!1d45211.603388780066!2d8.556058368287887!3d44.90858568307192!2m3!1f0!2f0!3f0!3m2!1i1024!2i768!4f13.1!3m3!1m2!1s0x47877431ed416505%3A0xd647f5990f0c62d9!2sAlessandria%2C%20Province%20of%20Alessandria%2C%20Italy!5e0!3m2!1sen!2sfr!4v1772632563726!5m2!1sen!2sfr" style="border:0;flex:0 0 48%;min-width:360px;height:450px;" allowfullscreen="" loading="lazy" referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade"></iframe>
  <img src="images/alessandria.jpg" alt="Alessandria" style="flex:0 0 48%;min-width:300px;height:450px;object-fit:cover;border:1px solid #ccc;" />
</div>
```

## Influence Functions

## Machine Unlearning

## Possible Applications to Plantnet

## Future Directions
